witnesses.description: The divisibility relation on the finite carrier {1, 2, 4}.
A bijective function table between two three-element sets.
A relation that is not a function because x0 has two outputs.

checks.claim: The listed relation is a partial order on the finite carrier.
checks.notes: The validator checks reflexivity, antisymmetry, and transitivity over the explicit pair set.

checks.claim: The listed finite graph is a bijective function from the domain to the codomain.
checks.notes: The validator checks totality, single-valuedness, injectivity, and surjectivity.

checks.claim: The listed finite graph is a function from the domain to the codomain.
checks.notes: The validator confirms x0 maps to two distinct codomain elements, violating single-valuedness.
